---
title: "Modelling and Data Tools Analysis in Python"
description: "Teaching Assistant -- Undergraduate course, University of Manchester"
date: 2019-01-01
role: "Teaching Assistant"
type: "Undergraduate course"
venue: "The University of Manchester, Department of Materials"
location: "Manchester, UK"
aliases:
  - /teaching/2019-manchester
---

In this role I am present in tutorial sessions to answer student questions and help them with coursework and tutorial exercises.
